# Generated by exon. Do not edit manually.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_EXPERIMENTAL_CXX_IMPORT_STD "451f2fe2-a8a2-47c3-bc32-94786d8fc91b")
set(CMAKE_CXX_MODULE_STD ON)
project(cppx LANGUAGES CXX)

if(MSVC)
    add_compile_options(/W4 /wd4996 /utf-8)
    add_compile_definitions(_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS)
endif()

add_library(cppx-modules)
target_sources(cppx-modules
    PUBLIC FILE_SET CXX_MODULES BASE_DIRS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.platform.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.reflect.cppm
)

add_library(cppx ALIAS cppx-modules)

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.env.system.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.platform.cppm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/cppx.reflect.cppm
    PROPERTIES COMPILE_DEFINITIONS
    "EXON_PKG_NAME=\"cppx\";EXON_PKG_VERSION=\"0.3.1\""
)

add_executable(test-env)
target_sources(test-env PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/env.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-env PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

add_executable(test-env_system)
target_sources(test-env_system PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/env_system.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-env_system PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

add_executable(test-platform)
target_sources(test-platform PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/platform.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-platform PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)

add_executable(test-reflect)
target_sources(test-reflect PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tests/reflect.cpp
)
target_link_libraries(test-reflect PRIVATE
    cppx-modules
)
